turns.query: Analyze the pollution situation at air quality station: Construction Building on 2025-06-02.
turns.actual_response:
数据库中不存在名为"Construction Building"的站点。经过全面搜索空气质量站点表（air_quality_station）和扬尘站点表（dust_station），均未找到该名称的站点，无论是精确匹配还是模糊匹配（包含"Construction"或"Building"关键词）。

可能的原因：
1. 站点名称可能使用了中文名称而非英文
2. 站点名称可能有拼写差异
3. 该站点可能不在数据库中

请提供正确的站点名称或站点ID，以便我进行后续分析。如果您知道该站点的中文名称或其他标识信息，请告知。
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_pm25 not set
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 首先查找Construction Building站点的ID
query_station = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Construction Building'""")
df_station = pd.read_sql(query_station, engine)
print(df_station)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查找Construction Building站点是否在扬尘站点表中
query_dust_station = text("""SELECT id, name, station_code FROM dust_station WHERE name = 'Construction Building'""")
df_dust = pd.read_sql(query_dust_station, engine)
print(df_dust)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 模糊搜索包含Construction的空气质量站点
query_station_like = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%Construction%'""")
df_station_like = pd.read_sql(query_station_like, engine)
print(df_station_like)

# 也搜索扬尘站点
query_dust_like = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name LIKE '%Construction%'""")
df_dust_like = pd.read_sql(query_dust_like, engine)
print(df_dust_like)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索包含Building的空气质量站点
query_station_building = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name LIKE '%Building%' LIMIT 20""")
df_station_building = pd.read_sql(query_station_building, engine)
print(df_station_building)

# 搜索包含Building的扬尘站点
query_dust_building = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name LIKE '%Building%' LIMIT 20""")
df_dust_building = pd.read_sql(query_dust_building, engine)
print(df_dust_building)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看空气质量站点的所有名称
query_all_stations = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station LIMIT 50""")
df_all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_stations, engine)
print(df_all_stations)

# 查看扬尘站点的所有名称
query_all_dust = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station LIMIT 50""")
df_all_dust = pd.read_sql(query_all_dust, engine)
print(df_all_dust)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索扬尘站点中可能包含英文或特定名称的站点
query_dust_all = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name LIKE '%Construction%' OR name LIKE '%Building%' OR name LIKE '%construction%' OR name LIKE '%building%' LIMIT 100""")
df_dust_search = pd.read_sql(query_dust_all, engine)
print(df_dust_search)

# 也尝试搜索所有扬尘站点名称中包含英文字母的
query_dust_english = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE name ~ '[A-Za-z]' LIMIT 100""")
df_dust_english = pd.read_sql(query_dust_english, engine)
print(df_dust_english.head(50))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索所有扬尘站点，查找是否有Construction Building
query_all_dust_names = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station ORDER BY id LIMIT 200""")
df_all_dust = pd.read_sql(query_all_dust_names, engine)
print(df_all_dust[df_all_dust['name'].str.contains('Construction|Building|construction|building', case=False, na=False)])

# 也检查空气质量站点表
query_all_station_names = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id LIMIT 200""")
df_all_station = pd.read_sql(query_all_station_names, engine)
print(df_all_station[df_all_station['name'].str.contains('Construction|Building|construction|building', case=False, na=False)])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试不区分大小写的搜索
query_case_insensitive = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER('Construction Building')""")
df_exact = pd.read_sql(query_case_insensitive, engine)
print("精确匹配结果:")
print(df_exact)

# 搜索所有扬尘站点名称，查看前100个
query_sample = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station ORDER BY id LIMIT 100""")
df_sample = pd.read_sql(query_sample, engine)
print("\n扬尘站点样本:")
print(df_sample)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取所有扬尘站点名称并检查
query_all_dust = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station""")
df_all_dust = pd.read_sql(query_all_dust, engine)

# 在Python中搜索包含Construction或Building的名称
matching = df_all_dust[df_all_dust['name'].str.contains('Construction|Building', case=False, na=False)]
print("匹配的扬尘站点:")
print(matching)

# 如果没有找到，显示所有唯一名称的前50个
if len(matching) == 0:
    print("\n未找到包含Construction或Building的站点。显示前50个唯一名称:")
    print(df_all_dust['name'].unique()[:50])

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索空气质量站点表中所有名称
query_all_air_stations = text("""SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station""")
df_air_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_air_stations, engine)

# 检查是否有英文名称的站点
english_names = df_air_stations[df_air_stations['name'].str.contains('[A-Za-z]', na=False)]
print("空气质量站点中包含英文字母的名称:")
print(english_names)

# 也检查扬尘站点
query_all_dust_stations = text("""SELECT id, name FROM dust_station""")
df_dust_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all_dust_stations, engine)

english_dust_names = df_dust_stations[df_dust_stations['name'].str.contains('[A-Za-z]', na=False)]
print("\n扬尘站点中包含英文字母的名称:")
print(english_dust_names.head(50))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 直接搜索确切的"Construction Building"名称，不区分大小写
query_exact = text("""SELECT id, name, 'air_quality_station' as table_name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE 'Construction Building'
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT id, name, 'dust_station' as table_name FROM dust_station WHERE name ILIKE 'Construction Building'""")
df_exact = pd.read_sql(query_exact, engine)
print("精确匹配结果:")
print(df_exact)

# 搜索所有包含"Construction"或"Building"的站点（不区分大小写）
query_like = text("""SELECT id, name, 'air_quality_station' as table_name FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE '%Construction%' OR name ILIKE '%Building%'
                     UNION ALL
                     SELECT id, name, 'dust_station' as table_name FROM dust_station WHERE name ILIKE '%Construction%' OR name ILIKE '%Building%'""")
df_like = pd.read_sql(query_like, engine)
print("\n模糊匹配结果:")
print(df_like)
